summary: Bug fix testing completed. All 3 reported bugs verified as FIXED. Fixed 1 additional bug found during testing (keyboard shortcuts error).
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Fixed keyboard shortcuts bug (setShowForm -> setIsDialogOpen, setEditingEntry -> setEditingId)
seed_data_creation: Used existing Badkutru and medinipur targets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs are now fixed and verified. Keyboard shortcuts also fixed.

bug_1_agent_payment_mark_paid.description: Agent Payment Mark Paid was failing with 'mandi target not found' error
bug_1_agent_payment_mark_paid.root_cause: Frontend was passing filters.kms_year instead of item.kms_year
bug_1_agent_payment_mark_paid.fix_applied_by: Main agent - changed handleMarkPaid to use item.kms_year and item.season
bug_1_agent_payment_mark_paid.verification: Tested Mark Paid for Badkutru - status changed from Pending to Paid, toast showed 'Payment cleared!'

bug_2_agent_payment_undo_paid.description: Agent Payment Undo Paid was failing
bug_2_agent_payment_undo_paid.root_cause: Same as bug 1 - using filters instead of item properties
bug_2_agent_payment_undo_paid.fix_applied_by: Main agent - changed handleUndoPaid to use item.kms_year and item.season
bug_2_agent_payment_undo_paid.verification: Tested Undo Paid for Badkutru - status changed from Paid back to Pending, toast showed 'Payment undo ho gaya!'

bug_3_autocomplete_keyboard_navigation.description: Autocomplete fields (Agent Name, Truck No, Mandi Name) not responding to keyboard controls
bug_3_autocomplete_keyboard_navigation.root_cause: AutoSuggest component was missing keyboard event handlers
bug_3_autocomplete_keyboard_navigation.fix_applied_by: Main agent - added handleKeyDown with ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape/Tab support
bug_3_autocomplete_keyboard_navigation.verification: Tested Agent Name autocomplete - typed 's', pressed ArrowDown (Ramesh highlighted with amber background), pressed Enter (Ramesh selected)

additional_bug_fixed_by_testing_agent.bug: Keyboard shortcuts (Alt+N, Alt+D, Alt+E, Alt+P, Escape) throwing 'setShowForm is not defined' error
additional_bug_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: handleGlobalKeyDown was using setShowForm and setEditingEntry which don't exist - should be setIsDialogOpen and setEditingId
additional_bug_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed setShowForm to setIsDialogOpen and setEditingEntry to setEditingId in /app/frontend/src/App.js
additional_bug_fixed_by_testing_agent.verification: All keyboard shortcuts now work: Alt+D (Dashboard), Alt+E (Entries), Alt+P (Payments), Alt+N (New Entry form), Escape (close dialogs)

agent_payments_total_amount_display.description: Total Amount column shows correct calculation (target_amount + cutting_amount)
agent_payments_total_amount_display.example: Badkutru: target_qntl=5000, base_rate=10, cutting_rate=0 → Total Amount = ₹50000 (5000×10 + 250×0)
